description: Compensation bill from Fustat. Dated: 7 Nisan 4815 AM = April 7 1055 CE. Three witnesses approved (not in front of the court) that Abū Zikrī Yehuda b. Moshe Ibn Ṣughmār received money that Menashshe b. David al-Madini, the money exchanger (al-Ṣayrafī), owed Yehuda’s uncle. The uncle is David b. Yehuda from Qayrawan. Signed by Yiṣḥaq b. ʿEli, Yosef b. Yaʿaqov, and Peraḥya b. Yosef. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #618) VMR
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
